evals.prompt: 用临门一脚改需求型老板的风格，在deadline前改需求，但让听起来很urgent
evals.expected_output: 充满'this is critical'、'just realized'的消息，80%urgency 20%clarity，buried insight关于真实的priorities

evals.prompt: The design is due in 1 hour. Using a last-minute-chaos boss style, add more requirements.
evals.expected_output: Urgent message about 'new insights', feature requests, built-in assumption they'll 'just figure it out', buried insight about real constraints

evals.prompt: 帮我用临时改需求的老板口气，在launch前48小时改strategy
evals.expected_output: 充满'刚想到'、'必须改'的长消息，buried insight关于真实的market signal
